pages.text: Caustic Soda is a very useful base in laboratory synthesis, and as a drain cleaner.

pages.title: Kelp
pages.text: Kelp is a halophilic plant, i.e. it grows in environments containing salt, like sea water. Its ashes contain sodium carbonate, which can be extracted from it using water. Click on a kelp ash block with a water bottle to get kelp ash mud, which can be picked up with a bucket, placed in a cauldron and filtered to get lye water.
